title: draba oreadum subsp. mariae-aliciae
intro: Draba oreadum subsp. mariae-aliciae is a subspecies of Draba oreadum, a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the rock cress or whitlow grass family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Draba oreadum subsp. mariae-aliciae include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
